## Release — backlog-campaign v0.4.1

### ✨ What's new in v0.4.1

This patch strengthens **campaign bootstrap and recovery**, tightens **worker handoff validation**, and simplifies the **review pipeline** with a deterministic aggregate step.

#### Bootstrap & forge hygiene

- **`bun run doctor`** — campaign bootstrap doctor checks config, queue, forge reachability, and common misconfigurations before you run the loop
- **`scripts/forge-deps.ts`** — persists `depends_on` edges from `queue.json` back into GitHub issue bodies so forge and queue stay aligned
- **Recovery protocol** — documented playbook for mixed or stale git worktrees when resuming a campaign mid-flight

#### Review pipeline

- **`scripts/review-aggregate.ts`** — deduplicates and ranks reviewer findings deterministically; replaces the `bc-synthesizer` agent across all platform trees
- **Worker JSON validation hook** — subagent stop hook validates planner, implementer, and reviewer JSON against SSOT schemas before handoff is accepted

#### Conformance & checkpoints

- **`V-PLAN-01`** — verify gate ensures plan artifacts meet touch-path and structure requirements
- **Checkpoint YAML frontmatter** — standardized frontmatter on checkpoint files for orchestrator resume and audit

#### Build layout

- **`.agents/build/` vs handoff dirs** — compiled plugin output lives under `.agents/build/`; ephemeral session handoff under `.agents/orchestrator/` and `.agents/worker_*` is clearly separated from campaign SSOT (`.bc-campaign/`)

---

**Full feature overview:** see [v0.1.0 release notes](https://github.com/CorentinLumineau/blackhole/releases/tag/v0.1.0) · [README](https://github.com/CorentinLumineau/blackhole#readme)
